ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county entity */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of financial transaction (e.g., debt retirement, interest payment) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the transaction */,
  "retirement_of_long_term_debt_operating_expenditures" REAL /* Amount of retirement of long-term debt for operating expenditures */,
  "retirement_of_long_term_debt_total" REAL /* Total amount of retirement of long-term debt */,
  "interest_on_long_term_debt_operating_expenditures" REAL /* Amount of interest on long-term debt for operating expenditures */,
  "interest_on_long_term_debt_total" REAL /* Total amount of interest on long-term debt */,
  "principal_and_interest_on_short_term_notes_and_warrants_operating_expenditures" REAL /* Amount of principal and interest on short-term notes and warrants for operating expenditures */,
  "principal_and_interest_on_short_term_notes_and_warrants_total" REAL /* Total amount of principal and interest on short-term notes and warrants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the county entity */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the county entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the action */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
